title: Webhook not registering due to URL mismatch
symptom: The production webhook endpoint resolves, but n8n does not pick up the requests, leading to no executions being registered.
applies_when: Using n8n with Traefik for TLS termination
Webhook URL is not correctly configured
not_this_if: Webhook works in a different environment
Using a different reverse proxy setup
root_cause: The issue arises when the externally reachable URL does not match the internal webhook registration URL. If the WEBHOOK_URL is unset or points to an internal address, incoming requests cannot be routed correctly to the execution handler.
fix_steps: Set the WEBHOOK_URL environment variable to reflect the public HTTPS endpoint.
Ensure that your reverse proxy forwards the headers X-Forwarded-Proto and X-Forwarded-Host.
Verify that N8N_HOST and N8N_PROTOCOL are consistent with your external domain.
agent_instruction: Configure the WEBHOOK_URL and ensure proper header forwarding in your reverse proxy.
